title: Achievements
seoTitle: Game of Darts Achievements | BarkinMad Studios
description: Understand Game Center achievement tracking across Game of Darts modes and current source-backed achievement behavior.
summary: Game Center achievements are tracked per mode using played-game counts and Game Center achievement descriptions.
heroImageAlt: Artwork for pending Game of Darts achievements image
sourceNotes: Exact App Store/Game Center achievement titles are loaded from Game Center descriptions and should be verified in Game Center before final public copy.

sections.heading: How achievements are tracked
paragraphs: When a game finishes, GameCenterManager increments the played count for that mode and reports progress against the mode's achievement IDs.
The central statistics documentation identifies achievement tracking for darts, cricket, snooker, golf, baseball, halveIt, bobs27, hareAndHound, oneTo20, killer, shanghai, and all5s.

sections.heading: What to verify
paragraphs: Achievement descriptions are loaded from Game Center and sorted by title in the app. Final public-facing achievement names should be verified from Game Center metadata.
Development and placeholder modes should not be promoted as release-facing achievement paths until their public availability is confirmed.

images.alt: Artwork for Game of Darts achievements
